name: io.github.citronlegacy/zerochan-mcp
description: MCP server for the Zerochan anime image board API. Browse the global feed, search by tags, and retrieve full entry metadata — directly from any MCP-compatible AI assistant.

environmentVariables.name: ZEROCHAN_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your Zerochan username. Included in every request's User-Agent header as required by the Zerochan API. The server will refuse to start without this value.
